title: Trump says US forces 'obliterated' military targets on Iran's key oil export island
subhead: Iran's Kharg Island is home to the main terminal that handles the country's oil exports.

title: 'In 1979, the Iranian left played a major role in the rise of the Islamic Republic'
subhead: Philosopher Stéphanie Roza and political scientist Amirpasha Tavakkoli explain how, throughout the 20th century, the political turmoil in Iran, torn between modernity and anti-modernity, ultimately led to Islamist victory.

title: Explosion damages Jewish school in Amsterdam, no injuries
subhead: The blast occurred in the early hours of Saturday morning and comes after nighttime attacks this week in front of synagogues in the Belgian city of Liege and the Dutch port city of Rotterdam.

title: Eric Fassin, sociologist: 'The Epstein case reveals the absolute power of men who, by flaunting their transgressions, declared themselves above the law'
subhead: The sociologist describes the Epstein case as 'a circle of male power that is closing ranks against feminist politics.' By exercising this violent domination, money, sexuality, knowledge and relationships become interchangeable forms of capital.

title: Advocates push to end ban on athletes with intellectual disabilities for 2030 Winter Paralympics
subhead: While no athletes with intellectual disabilities compete in the Milan-Cortina 2026 Winter Games, a campaign is underway to have adapted sports reinstated in the Paralympic program for 2030, when the Games will be held in the French Alps.

title: Benjamin Netanyahu, a prime minister without checks and balances
subhead: The strikes in Iran have further reduced the political space for opposition in Israel, even as concerns mount over a possible ground offensive in Lebanon. Today, only Donald Trump seems capable of influencing the Israeli leader.

title: An exhibition where art confronts death
subhead: The Pinault Collection's new exhibition at the Bourse de Commerce, 'Clair-obscur,' features some 100 works by 27 artists that explore the theme of death.
